# seerr_issue (Resource)

Manage Seerr media issues.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issue_type` (Number) The type of the issue (1: Video, 2: Audio, 3: Subtitle, 4: Other).
- `media_id` (Number) The ID of the media associated with the issue.

### Optional

- `message` (String) A message describing the issue.
- `status` (Number) The status of the issue (1: Open, 2: Resolved).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
